violations.text: The cold-water supply line to the bathroom hand sink and mop sink was observed in need of repair (not connected at time of inspection). Hot water was observed to be supplying the sink faucets at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, plumber is to return to reconnect. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair/replacement... - Wall-to-floor junctures/coving was observed to be missing in some areas of the establishment. Junctures/coving is to be replaced. - Ceiling tiles in the retail areas were observed to be stained, broken, and in need of replacement. Ceiling tiles are to be replaced. - Exterior portions of the facility wall covering was observed to be in need of repair to prevent possible entry of rodents/pests. Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The door to the outside, located in the backroom area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair/replacement... - Wall-to-floor junctures/coving was observed to be missing in some areas of the establishment. Junctures/coving is to be replaced. - Ceiling tiles in the retail and backroom areas were observed to be stained/broken/missing. Ceiling tiles are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the backroom area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
